title: When Forgiveness Was a Trap - Ada Palmer
summary: A discussion between Dwarkesh Patel and Ada Palmer on the historical and philosophical dimensions of forgiveness. The conversation explores how forgiveness has functioned as a social or institutional mechanism with potential negative consequences.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel speaks with Ada Palmer about the historical and philosophical dimensions of forgiveness. The conversation examines how forgiveness has operated as a social and institutional mechanism rather than only a personal virtue, and how that role could carry negative consequences. The framing, signaled by the title, treats forgiveness as something that could function as a trap.
